name: ux-skill
description: The strongest UX plugin for Claude Code. Anti-AI-slop discipline, mandatory discovery protocol, SEO baked in, 17 slash commands, 5 sub-agents, 30+ Polaris-style reference files. For anyone building a SaaS or product who refuses to ship work that looks generated.

plugins.name: ux
plugins.description: Design intelligence for Claude Code. 17 callable slash commands (frame, audit, critique, a11y, copy, motion, polish, design, system, dashboard, component, fix, case-study, next, expert, research, workshop), 5 specialized sub-agents (frontend-engineer, motion-engineer, copy-writer, research-synthesizer, design-system-architect), 30+ Polaris-style reference files. Mandatory discovery protocol before any generation, SEO foundation baked into every public-web output, comprehensive anti-AI-slop ban list, high-end creative arsenal. Works across React, Next.js, Vue, Blade, Astro, vanilla.
